name: Cream Puff Souffle with Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------SOUFFLE----------------------------------
6 Egg yolks
1/2 cup Sugar
4 Egg whites
A few drops of lemon juice
1 cup Heavy cream
3 tablespoons Bailey's Irish Cream
3 tablespoons Irish whiskey
------------------------------HOT FUDGE SAUCE------------------------------
8 ounces Bittersweet chocolate (good quality: Callebaut)
1/2 cup Heavy cream
1. Beat the egg yolks with half the sugar in a large bowl until very thick and light in color.
2. In another large bowl, beat the whites with lemon juice until foamy.
3. Gradually add the remaining sugar while continuing to beat until the whites are firm but still glossy.
4. Stir the Bailey's Irish Cream and whiskey into the yolks, then fold in the whites.
5. Fill the puffs with the souffle mixture and replace the tops.
6. Place on cookie sheets or trays, cover with foil, and freeze several hours or overnight.
7. Just before serving, melt the chocolate with cream, stirring well to blend. Pass the hot sauce at the table, to be poured over frozen souffles.
